---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for Archvault
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

A clear and concise description of the problem or limitation you're experiencing.

## Proposed Solution

A clear and concise description of what you'd like to happen.

## Alternatives Considered

A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## C4 Level

Which C4 level(s) does this relate to?

- [ ] Level 1 — System Context
- [ ] Level 2 — Container / App
- [ ] Level 3 — Component
- [ ] Not specific to a C4 level

## Additional Context

Add any other context, mockups, or screenshots about the feature request here.
